title: Formal lint: solve-state wave_count zeroed
description: Set wave_count to 0 in solve-state.json to trigger formal_lint structural anomaly

mutation.description: Set wave_count to 0 triggering formal_lint anomaly

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect zeroed wave_count via formal_lint

title: Formal lint: layer-manifest total_layers inflated
description: Set total_layers to 999 in layer-manifest.json to trigger formal_lint anomaly

mutation.description: Set total_layers to 999 triggering formal_lint anomaly

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect inflated total_layers via formal_lint

title: Formal lint: model-registry TLA+ path broken
description: Change a model path in model-registry.json to a nonexistent file to trigger formal_lint

mutation.description: Change model path to nonexistent file

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect broken model path via formal_lint

title: Formal lint: model-registry entry pointing to nonexistent file
description: Add a model entry pointing to a nonexistent TLA+ file to trigger formal_lint

mutation.description: Add model entry pointing to nonexistent TLA+ file

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect missing model file via formal_lint

title: Formal lint: solve-state iteration_count zeroed
description: Set iteration_count to 0 in solve-state.json to trigger formal_lint structural anomaly

mutation.description: Set iteration_count to 0 triggering formal_lint anomaly

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect zeroed iteration_count via formal_lint
